airline.description: This tool contains information related to airline operations, flight schedules, delays, and airport and air carrier information.

citeseer.description: This tool contains information related to citation analysis, paper classification, and natural language processing in the field of text mining and bibliometrics.

disney.description: This tool contains information related to Disney movies, including directors, revenue, voice actors, characters, and movie gross.

mondial_geo.description: This tool contains information related to geographical features, countries, economies, religions, languages, organizations, and cities.

world.description: This tool contains information related to country and city demographics, languages, and economic indicators.

menu.description: This tool contains information related to menus, dishes, and menu items in a restaurant setting.

ice_hockey_draft.description: This tool contains information related to hockey players, their personal information, draft rankings, and game performance statistics.

soccer_2016.description: This tool contains information related to soccer matches, covering various aspects of the game, including teams, players, umpires, venues, and outcomes.

university.description: This tool contains information related to university rankings, demographics, and the countries where universities are located.

student_loan.description: This tool contains information related to student records, including enrollment, absences, bankruptcy, and employment status.

sales_in_weather.description: This tool contains information related to sales and weather conditions, including store and weather station information, and climate conditions.

public_review_platform.description: This tool contains information related to businesses, user interactions, and engagement metrics on a review platform, likely Yelp.

movies_4.description: This tool contains information related to movies, including information about cast, crew, genres, languages, and production companies.

european_football_1.description: This tool contains information related to football matches, their results, participating teams, and associated divisions, along with the season information.

music_platform_2.description: This tool contains information related to podcasts and their associated reviews, including information on podcast categories, review ratings, and review creation runs.

cars.description: This tool contains information related to car specifications, performance, and country of origin.

hockey.description: This tool contains information related to hockey, focusing on player, team, and coach statistics, and various awards.

world_development_indicators.description: This tool contains information related to country-specific economic indicators, national accounts, and development relevance.

movie_3.description: This tool contains information related to a film rental business, including film details, staff and customer information, rentals, payments, and inventory.

trains.description: This tool contains information related to trains and their constituent cars, including direction, position, physical attributes, and load information.

cookbook.description: This tool contains information related to recipes, their ingredients, preparation times, and nutritional content.

computer_student.description: This tool contains information related to academia, covering course levels, faculty positions, and student qualifications.

bike_share_1.description: This tool contains information related to a bike-sharing system, including station locations, real-time status, trip information, and weather data.

movie.description: This tool contains information related to actors and movies, including their personal details, movie details, and character details.

music_tracker.description: This tool contains information related to music releases, their metadata, and associated tags.

language_corpus.description: This tool contains information related to the languages, focusing on Wikipedia pages, word occurrences, and language statistics.

food_inspection.description: This tool contains information related to the inspection, regulation, and detailed information of eateries.

video_games.description: This tool contains information related to game sales, platforms, publishers, genres, and their distribution across different regions.

craftbeer.description: This tool contains information related to beers and breweries, including their identifiers, alcohol content, bitterness levels, names, styles, serving sizes, and brewery locations.

movielens.description: This tool contains information related to movies, directors, actors, user interactions, and movie metadata.

app_store.description: This tool contains information related to Google Play Store applications, user reviews, and sentiment analysis.

chicago_crime.description: This tool contains information related to crime reports, police districts, FBI crime classification, community areas, and neighborhoods.

movie_platform.description: This tool contains information related to movies, user subscriptions, movie ratings, and movie lists on Mubi.

simpson_episodes.description: This tool contains information related to awards, episodes, credits, characters, and votes in a television or film context.

coinmarketcap.description: This tool contains information related to cryptocurrency coins and their historical market data.

talkingdata.description: This tool contains information related to mobile device usage, user behavior, demographics, and geolocation.

address.description: This tool contains information related to postal points, demographics, geographic areas, and payroll reports.

restaurant.description: This tool contains information related to restaurants, their locations, food types, and reviews.

shakespeare.description: This tool contains information related to theatre works, their chapters, scenes, characters, and paragraphs.

olympics.description: This tool contains information related to the Olympic Games, including games, cities, sports, events, competitors, regions, and medals.

image_and_language.description: This tool contains information related to image attributes, object classes, and prediction relationships between objects within images, captured through image samples, bounding boxes, and unique identifiers.

legislator.description: This tool contains information related to legislators, their social media presence, political affiliations, and legislative service, including various IDs, personal information, and term details.

codebase_comments.description: This tool contains information related to GitHub repositories, software solutions, methods, and method parameters, including repository and solution details, method information, and parameter specifications.

beer_factory.description: This tool contains information related to beer products, their brands, customer information, reviews, transactions, and geographical data.

law_episode.description: This tool contains information related to the Law & Order series, covering episodes, awards, credits, and personal information.

college_completion.description: This tool contains information related to higher education institutions, including their graduation rates, student demographics, and financial information.

books.description: This tool contains information related to book orders, customer information, addresses, shipping methods, and publishers.

authors.description: This tool contains information related to academic papers, authors, and publication venues.

mental_health_survey.description: This tool contains information related to surveys, including question text, user responses, and survey descriptions, all tied together with unique identifiers.

professional_basketball.description: This tool contains information related to basketball statistics, covering player and team performance, draft information, and coach records.

book_publishing_company.description: This tool contains information related to the book publishing industry, including documents on publications, authors, employees, and sales.

genes.description: This tool contains information related to gene interactions, classifications, and properties, including gene correlation scores and various gene attributes.
